reply.text: Be honest did you fall asleep mid gossip or mid snack

messages.text: That honest line needs a refund
Wow so you gatekeep chips and drama now
Obviously, you have not earned front row gossip seats
im at least balcony level entertainment though
Balcony level boys stay on read, sorry
Crazy because you posted this just for balcony boy
Please, this was for my own cuteness agenda
so its me or its me?
You talk big, can you back it
I was checking if you needed snack security detail
You as security is actually terrifying 😭
I protect snacks and roast egos, full package
Hm, ego protection sounds kinda useful sometimes 😂
Let me prove it with a drink and live gossip recap
You think you can handle my live gossip chaos?
let me take you to drinks. text me 555 155 8081
